headline: Is it Prudent to Retain Insulet Stock in Your Portfolio for Now?
summary: PODD's Omnipod 5 momentum and global growth support its outlook, but competitive pressure and macro costs may test its margin expansion plans.

headline: Why Insulet (PODD) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
summary: Insulet (PODD) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: How To Target A 10% Yield While Catching The BSX Stock Knife?
summary: Generate an immediate income that you keep regardless, plus the opportunity to buy the stock cheaper should its price fall far enough.

headline: Insulet launches Omnipod 5 in Spain
summary: A high rate of continuous glucose monitor adoption and low level of automated insulin delivery system penetration make Spain an attractive market for Insulet.
